name: zutil_zrdr_grow_free_pool
description: zUtil_ZRDR::GrowFreePool allocates one free-list node, pushes it into the ZRDR free pool, and increments the allocation counter.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zUtil_ZRDR::GrowFreePool: 11 unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 25 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 8 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is local call/register scheduling around malloc, zUtil_ZRDR::PushFreeNode, and the total-allocation counter increment.
The native smoke verifies that ZRDR preallocation grows the free pool by the requested node count and updates total/free counters.
